worker_a.role: Worker A owns the shared website shell, visual styling, and navigation state.
constraints: Use vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
No external libraries, npm packages, or CDN dependencies.
index.html must expose a start screen with buttons/cards for Snake, Tic Tac Toe, and Memory Match.
app.js must coordinate switching between games and call game-specific functions exposed on window.
The design should be clear enough to demo quickly in a browser.

worker_b.role: Worker B owns the three game implementations and validation script.
constraints: Each game file must attach a start function to window, for example window.startSnakeGame.
Snake must be playable with keyboard controls.
Tic Tac Toe must allow two local players to click cells.
Memory Match must allow flipping cards and matching pairs.
validate_site.js must run with Node, verify all required files exist, and check JavaScript syntax using node --check or an equivalent parser-free approach.
Validation must pass with node validate_site.js.
